config.enabled.name: Enable HUD
config.enabled.tooltip: Show weather-exclusive fish icons on the HUD. Disable to hide the overlay entirely.
config.hud-x.name: HUD X Position
config.hud-x.tooltip: Horizontal position of the fish icons. Negative values offset from the right edge of the screen.
config.hud-y.name: HUD Y Position
config.hud-y.tooltip: Vertical position of the fish icons (pixels from the top of the screen).
config.horizontal-layout.name: Horizontal Layout
config.horizontal-layout.tooltip: If enabled, fish icons are arranged in a horizontal row instead of a vertical column.
config.max-locations.name: Max Locations Shown
config.max-locations.tooltip: Maximum number of spawn locations shown in each tooltip. Set to 0 to show all.
config.show-bundle-needs.name: Show Bundle Needs
config.show-bundle-needs.tooltip: Show which Community Center bundles still need each fish in the tooltip.
config.hide-already-caught.name: Hide Already Caught
config.hide-already-caught.tooltip: Hide fish you've already caught at least once. Useful for tracking what you still need.
config.min-sell-price.name: Minimum Sell Price
config.min-sell-price.tooltip: Only show fish worth at least this much gold. Accounts for fishing professions like Fisher and Angler. Set to 0 to show all fish.
config.show-night-fish.name: Show Night Fish
config.show-night-fish.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught at night (6pm onwards), even if they have no specific weather requirement.
config.page-position.name: Position & Layout
config.page-position.tooltip: Configure where the fish icons appear and how big they are.
config.icon-scale.name: Icon Scale
config.icon-scale.tooltip: Size multiplier for fish icons. 1.0 is the default size, 2.0 is double.
config.catchable-now-color.name: Catchable Now Background
config.catchable-now-color.tooltip: Background color for fish you can catch right now. Use hex format like #00FF0080 (RRGGBBAA). Set to #00000000 for transparent.
config.night-fish-color.name: Night Fish Background
config.night-fish-color.tooltip: Background color for fish that can only be caught at night (after 6pm). Use hex format like #0000FF80 (RRGGBBAA). Set to #00000000 for transparent.
config.weather-section.name: Weather Types
config.weather-section.tooltip: Choose which weather conditions to track. Fish exclusive to enabled weather types will appear on the HUD.
config.track-rain.name: Track Rain
config.track-rain.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught when it's raining.
config.track-storm.name: Track Storms
config.track-storm.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught during thunderstorms.
config.track-sun.name: Track Sunny
config.track-sun.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught on sunny days (like Sunfish).
config.track-snow.name: Track Snow
config.track-snow.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught when it's snowing.
config.track-wind.name: Track Wind
config.track-wind.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught during windy/debris weather.
config.track-green-rain.name: Track Green Rain
config.track-green-rain.tooltip: Show fish that can only be caught during green rain.
